calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Continued
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Andrew Schultz appeared via zoom for Pamela McMullin (executor).

Mr. Schultz stated that they have a waiver on accounting from 1 beneficiary, and that he will need additional time to complete the inventory and appraisal. The matter is continued to October 15, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Continued To Sep-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-06-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Approving Status Report And Continuing Administration Of The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew K. Schultz for Pamela P. McMullin, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Mr. Schultz confirmed that all required documents had been submitted and requested to proceed with closing the estate. The Court confirmed that everything appeared to be in order and took the petition for order approving the final report and for distribution under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Continued To May-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew K. Schultz for Pamela P. McMullin, Executor (via Zoom).

Mr. Shultz reported that he filed a status report this morning and stated that the executor recently completed collecting the estate assets, including stock certificates that required time to be transferred into a Schwab account. An inventory has been submitted to the probate referee for valuation. Once the inventory is returned, the petition for final distribution can be filed.

The court continued the matter to May 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-28-2025 Continued To Mar-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-03-2000 is admitted to probate. Pamela P. McMullin is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-28-2025 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Park. Not Reported.
